summary.profileStatement: Security infrastructure engineer with 9 years of experience spanning build and operations automation in finance and public sectors. Designed Splunk ES-based security monitoring, built FortiGate HA, network segmentation, and VPN/NAC architectures, and automated repetitive tasks with Ansible, Python, and n8n. Currently focused on combining Observability and DevSecOps to own the full lifecycle from design to operations.

careers.project: Nextrade Trading Execution System Security Operations SM
careers.description: FortiGate HA design/deployment, network segmentation architecture, Ansible-based security device standardization, ISMS-P certification, Splunk ES security monitoring, n8n-based security automation, security incident response

personalProjects.name: Observability Platform
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Metrics and logs across the homelab were fragmented, which slowed down root-cause analysis.
[Action] I collected 50+ metric endpoints with Prometheus and unified three data sources—Loki, Elasticsearch, and Prometheus—into 12+ Grafana dashboards.
[Result] The platform maintained 99.5% infrastructure uptime while establishing a single-pane operating baseline for metrics and logs.

personalProjects.name: n8n Automation
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Alerting, deployment, and data-collection tasks depended on scattered scripts and manual execution.
[Action] I built 15+ workflows on n8n and connected Slack, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Grafana into one automation hub.
[Result] The system now runs 200+ executions per day and processes 6K+ automation events per month as a stable operations orchestration layer.

personalProjects.name: Fortinet API Client
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Firewall policy checks, route lookups, and log-statistics collection depended on manual CLI work and separate consoles.
[Action] I built a Python library that wraps the FortiManager and FortiAnalyzer REST APIs and abstracts policy lookup, route management, and log statistics into reusable methods.
[Result] The library reduced manual operating time by 80% and established a reusable API foundation for security automation.

metrics.features: Policy lookup, route management, and log statistics

personalProjects.name: Security Alert System
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] FortiGate security events were split across devices and log systems, which delayed real-time response.
[Action] I operated 32 Splunk detection rules and built a Python + Slack Block Kit notification pipeline for immediate triage.
[Result] Alerts are delivered within 30 seconds after an event and the automation baseline helps cut unnecessary alerts by 70%.

metrics.responseTime: Alert within 30 seconds after event detection

personalProjects.name: IP Blacklist Platform
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Threat-intelligence feeds were scattered, making it hard to compare and analyze malicious IPs quickly.
[Action] I combined a Flask REST API with a Next.js dashboard and applied GeoIP enrichment in PostgreSQL to consolidate 3+ threat-intelligence feeds into a single workflow.
[Result] The platform created one place to collect, analyze, and inspect malicious IP intelligence, reducing lookup overhead for threat review.

personalProjects.name: HYCU FSDS Autonomous Driving
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] The Formula Student Driverless Simulator required stable perception and control for cone detection and path following.
[Action] I integrated Python-based LiDAR cone detection (Grid BFS), Pure Pursuit path tracking, and a three-tier safety state machine in a ROS + Docker + AirSim environment.
[Result] The project won the Excellence Award at the Hanyang Cyber University Formula competition and delivered a working simulator-based autonomous driving stack.

personalProjects.name: Resume Portfolio
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Career history, projects, and operating signals were spread across separate documents, which made recruiter review slower.
[Action] I built a Cloudflare Workers portfolio and combined JSON-LD SEO, Grafana Loki logging, and /health, /metrics, and Web Vitals tracking into one web asset.
[Result] The result is a low-latency, globally distributed public portfolio at resume.jclee.me with verifiable deployment and health signals.

metrics.cicd: GitLab CI/CD auto deployment + deployment timestamp injection

hero.title: Jaecheol Lee
hero.subtitle: Finance/Public Security Infrastructure · Splunk ES 32 Rules · FortiGate HA 99.99% · n8n Automation 70%

achievements: Designed Nextrade ATS security infrastructure to a 99.99% HA target and passed FSC production approval.
Built an integrated Splunk-FortiNet security operations system with 32 detection rules and alerts delivered within 30 seconds.
Reduced unnecessary Nextrade alerts by 70% and cut firewall policy lookup time by 80% through operations automation.
Operated an observability platform with 12+ dashboards, 50+ metric endpoints, and 99.5% uptime across the homelab.
Built an n8n automation platform with 15+ workflows, 200+ daily executions, and 6K+ monthly automation events.
At Jointree, achieved 80% prevention effectiveness with 200 blocked incidents per month, 20% better sensitive-data detection, and 99.9% service availability.
At Metanet, reduced NAC exception processing by 90% (30 minutes → 3 minutes) and switch inspection time by 75% (8 hours → 2 hours).
At Metanet, resolved antivirus-VPN conflicts to reduce support tickets by 40% (20/week → 12/week) and delivered three new sites.
At KAI, removed 30% of duplicate firewall rules (3,000 → 2,100) and maintained zero internal data-leak incidents.
At FunNC, reduced MTTR by 50% (2 hours → 1 hour) through backup/recovery automation and improved early vulnerability detection by 80%.
At Quant, established Terraform-based AWS security codification and prepared the platform for robo-advisor testbed security review.
